title: timeline switcher
description: adds an item that lets you switch beetween 2 different timelines
body:
this adds an item simaller to the time gauntlet in titanfall. it lets you switch beetween 2 dimensions in the game that are mostly the same.

there is a compass version of the item that tells you witch dimension you are in when you switch

![compass switcher recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0baa05581b3d3099724fd097a17bda44d0321e9c.png)

simply right click to use the items.

# something to note about the "second timeline"

the terrain generation is the same but biomes generate differently from the overworld, so you may find structures in weird spots or forests not being there/being there in different places

# dependencies

this mod does not have any dependencies and you are free to use in any mod pack
